name: Tulum on the Water
tagline: SLEEPS 16!! Large groups are welcome!! Stunning waterfront compound separated into 4 different living areas. Exquisite modern home and stunning designer finishes throughout the home and boho vibes & decor.
features: A lush waterfront pool/jacuzzi overlooking the Miami skyline. Perfect for family gatherings, and reunions. Guest count max is 16. Families, any additional items needed to accommodate babies & children, let me know! Pets welcome!
Great For Groups
With 9 bedrooms, this property is ideal for large groups to call home while on vacation in paradise.
Pool + Jacuzzi + Waterfront
If your groups loves to enjoy water, this is the right villa for you as the opportunites are endless.
Privacy

name: Villa Paraiso
tagline: Sublime Contemporary waterfront home 2-story. Privately gated, lush landscaping with a spacious deck, boat lift, brand new pool, spillover Jacuzzi/spa, & outdoor kitchen with barbecue. 90 ft frontage on the water with boat lift. 16ft/18ft clearance.
features: Gourmet kitchen with Electrolux refrigeration, 2 ovens, wine cellar  & oversized Island. Expansive master bedroom overlooking the water & the pool. A smart system with lighting control, surround system. Living room with chimney, 6 bedrooms & 4,5 bathrooms.
Be mesmerized by all the glass & water features. Brand new bathrooms, top of the line amenities. The living area has LED lighting and a pool table that makes this the ultimate luxury pad.
Chef Kitchen
California kitchen w/ barbecue, gourmet kitchen, large second balcony lounge, glass floating staircase with high ceilings.
Great Location

name: Boardwalk Mansion
tagline: Sleeps 16 people. 5 main house bedrooms and two guest house bedrooms. This modern, waterfront residence includes a private rooftop lounge overlooking the Fort Lauderdale Intercoastal.
features: This exquisitely curated home features top of the line finishes, interior designs by world renowned designer. Meticulously groomed lush landscape overlooking the waterfront. Features of home include: Outdoor California kitchen, fire features, dock, infinity pool and jacuzzi.

Each living space is unique with its own design for ample living the millionaire South Florida lifestyle. An outdoor California kitchen, a floating modern prism staircase. a basketball court, your own putting green are some of the many amenities in this modern masterpiece. Features even include a glass fireplace.
Luxury Living
With tasteful and seamless renovation, this home is unique and refreshing. Your entire group will be wowed by this villas spaces.
Great Location

name: Villa Coral
tagline: Newly built Mediterranean with a modern twist, just minutes from Coral Gables. Let this be your private oasis for the weekend or weeks to stay and play. Featuring 5 spacious bedrooms that pack a mighty punch and can comfortably sleep up to 14 guests.
features: Step inside and you’re greeted by an inviting foyer that leads you through to the family room with eat in kitchen. Double height windows display the perfect image of outdoor living in Miami.

Look out across the salt water pool and your eyes are led to a shaded area of the garden specifically designed for you to eat and play when your not catching rays in the pool or lounging in the sundeck as the jets swirl around you.

Take a stroll down the Miracle Mile dotted with shops, restaurants and cafes, new staples like The Gramercy will have you out into the early hours. Also just minutes from the expressway, you can be Downtown, Wynwood or the Beach in a short drive.
Newly Renovated
With tasteful and seamless renovation, this home is unique and refreshing.

name: Villa Grace
tagline: Nestled in the pedestrian-friendly community of South Miami and neighboring the Coral Gables waterways that lead you right into the heart of Coconut Grove and Downtown, this villa exemplifies Miami charm and modern lux.
features: Nestled in the pedestrian friendly community of South Miami and neighboring the Coral Gables waterways that lead you right into the heart of Coconut Grove and Downtown, this villa exemplifies Miami charm and modern lux. Step inside the foyer and you are instantly captivated by 20 foot ceilings graced by walls of glass in the this one of a kind great room that gives open concept a new meaning. The canopy of bamboo provides the privacy you deserve and creates a unique backdrop as you look out of the oversized windows.
5 Bedrooms 3 Bathrooms Game Room Interior Space 3,030 SQFT Total Area 9,400 SQFT Sleeps 10
Latest Property
With tasteful and seamless renovation, this home is unique and refreshing.
Great Location

name: Villa Granada
tagline: Beautifully gated Modern Mediterranean Oasis located in the heart of the city. Completely renovated in 2022 to the highest standards, we invite you to discover this one-of-a-kind tropical sanctuary.
features: Enter into a grand foyer with vaulted ceilings beaming with natural light, and allow the stunning space to take your breath away. The meticulously designed floor plan features an inviting interior with perfectly designated spaces flowing seamlessly for friends and family to enjoy versatility at its best; never miss a beat as you transition from family room to wet bar, gaming area, dining and a custom eat-in kitchen.
Coral Gables 7 Bedrooms 6 Bathrooms 3,750 Interior Sq Ft 10,500 Sq Ft Total Area Resort Style Pool & Jacuzzi Pool table / Basketball / Ping-Pong Sleeps 18
Games Galore

During the day, enjoy the South Florida sunshine with your favorite cocktails, work up a sweat by trying your hand on the ping-pong table or shooting hoops and as the sun begins to set, take it all in by soaking in the spa as you consider your plan for the evening.

name: Villa Terra
tagline: Welcome to Villa Terra, a newly remodeled Luxury Estate sitting on an oversized lot showcasing resort-style amenities and offering unrivaled entertainment for absolutely everyone. This masterpiece defines fun in the sun!
features: Step inside and a beautiful floor to ceiling custom acrylic fireplace immediately catch your eye as you take in the enormity of this massive space. From the dual marble waterfall counters which light up to the vault style wine cellar, this unique home has it all. With little expense spared during the remodel, the master suite features a huge walk-in closet which leads you into your private spa with a sunken hot tub allowing you to soak in style. As impressive as the indoor space is, the real fun begins when you step outside where every inch of space was thoughtfully designed to offer a space that perfectly combines entertainment and play. There is really nothing else in the luxury villa market that comes close, this property received the full court press!
Luxury Living
Luxury Estate sitting on an oversized lot showcasing resort-style amenitites.
Lots of Space
100% of recent guests gave the location a 5-star rating. Have a lot of restaurants and bars nearby. The villas oversized bedrooms and entertainment areas will be enjoyed by your group.
Great for Remote Work
